# Release Checklist

## Version

- [ ] Update `package.json`
- [ ] Review plugin metadata

## Validation

- [ ] Run `npm test`
- [ ] Run `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] Run `npm run build`
- [ ] Test in Figma Desktop

## Functional Checks

- [ ] `Read selection`
- [ ] `Export JSON`
- [ ] `Create`
- [ ] `Create and apply`
- [ ] Variables creation/reuse
- [ ] Text styles creation/reuse
- [ ] Color styles creation/reuse
- [ ] Effect styles creation/reuse

## Docs

- [ ] Review `README.md`
- [ ] Review changelog or release notes

## Publish

- [ ] Commit release changes
- [ ] Create tag
- [ ] Publish or share
